heading: Criminal referral
label: 894d–2 Criminal referral
text: If the Secretary of Commerce finds, pursuant to an investigation under , evidence that a crime may have been committed, the Secretary shall refer the matter to the appropriate law enforcement authorities, including the appropriate United States Attorney.section 894d–1 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 3549 and is classified to .section 3547 of Pub. L. 114–328section 894f of this title
